bugs.summary: The patch makes workflow spec thinking defaults override explicit runtime thinking defaults.
bugs.impact: /workflow run --thinking/--reasoning can silently be ignored for specs with defaults.thinking, defeating reproducible eval/model runs.
acceptableFixes: Add a regression test for --thinking overriding workflow defaults.thinking.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.
Assuming every holdout task contains a seeded bug.

difficulty.rationale: Same invariant as model override but on separate thinking path.

approvedBy: repro.sh RED/GREEN or no-op revert check
approval.notes: Local blind holdout locked before calibration runs; provider review pending before promotion to primary release gate.
